generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swing motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AnemometerDataTransmitted
]

instance CartMotorPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures cart motor position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance HoistMotorPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist motor position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance AnemometerDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartMotorPositionSensor
]

instance HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistMotorPositionSensor
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle sensor readings"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance AnemometerData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed sensor readings"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AnemometerDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CartMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Cart motor position readings"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance HoistMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Hoist motor position readings"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of the gantry crane in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Gantrylib
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model of crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Gantrylib
]

instance ArcadiaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering model using Arcadia methodology"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Capella
]

instance Gantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for gantry crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGeneration, RealTimeSimulation
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for service deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGeneration, RealTimeSimulation, ContinuousValidation, HistoricalDataLogging, DataVisualization
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PostgreSQL-based time-series database for historical data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLogging, DataVisualization
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for data dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualization
]

instance MosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLogging
]

instance Fusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling tool for crane geometry"
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering tool for Arcadia models"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGeneration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories using kinematic models to eliminate residual swing"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryGuidance
]

instance RealTimeSimulation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics in real-time for validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulatedTrajectoryComparison
]

instance ContinuousValidation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares real-time measurements against simulations with threshold-based breach alerts"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviationMetrics
]

instance HistoricalDataLogging : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs sensor readings and control commands to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataStorage
]

instance DataVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides Grafana-based data visualization dashboard for operators"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalDashboard
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGuidance : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Guidance for crane movement planning based on optimal trajectories"
]

instance SimulatedTrajectoryComparison : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison between simulated and real-time trajectory data for validation"
]

instance DeviationMetrics : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Metrics indicating deviations between real-time measurements and simulation"
]

instance HistoricalDataStorage : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Accessible historical data for analysis and visualization"
]

instance OperationalDashboard : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time and historical data visualization for crane operation monitoring"
]

instance SystemAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual adjustments to crane system based on validation results"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance CraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CraneFrame, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, TMC4671EvalCartController, TMC4671EvalHoistController, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoMicrocontroller, PowerSupplyUnit
]

instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural frame of the gantry crane"
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Microcontroller for sensor data acquisition and control"
]

instance PowerSupplyUnit : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for the physical system"
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling cart movement"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling hoist movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for lifting pucks"
]

instance TMC4671EvalCartController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for cart motor"
]

instance TMC4671EvalHoistController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for hoist motor"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for crane movement (e.g., trajectory paths) generated by the Trajectory Generator Service and Simulation Service, sent via MQTT to the Control Application, which interfaces with the crane's motor controllers to execute movements."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous synchronization with real-time data logging and validation, where measurements are compared against simulations at the frequency of sensor data acquisition (no specific interval specified, but continuous operation)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated via MQTT broker connecting Physical Crane Interface, Control Application, Logging Application, HMI, and digital twin services (Database, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation), all deployed on a single PC using Docker containers for non-Python components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), focusing on real-time monitoring, fault detection, and validation during crane operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service calculates distance metrics between real-time measurements and simulated trajectories; threshold breaches trigger dashboard alerts; model validation methods reused from prior research for verification."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for all inter-service communication and physical-to-digital data exchange; Physical Crane Interface communicates with hardware controllers via serial/USB."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All components deployed on a single personal computer; Python services installed via pip; Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard containerized using Docker Compose."
]
